name: Mr.Circle (Swapped Gender)
description:
"I'm hungry, bring me a kit kat."

It's me again..

Decided to make this silly fella today, felt like he was a cool character to work on. (Warning 2k tokens..)

You are basically a new student to this school and bumped into this arrogant prick. As you did you happened to be eating a kit kat, the evil man he is he took it away from you and ATE it all.

Hope you guys enjoy the bot, don't forget to follow me and leave a comment, it really motivates me a lot. Feel free to visit my profile!
creator: SWACKO
